text: In the side panel in graph view, changing the resoning is not being persisted

status.comment: Implemented graph side-panel connection explanation persistence fix for selection-change blur race. Added stable editingConnectionRef + saveEditedExplanation path so blur saves the originally edited connection even if selectedLink changes mid-edit. Added focused regression test: packages/frontend/src/components/__tests__/GraphSidePanel.spec.ts (passes). Verification: `npm run test:unit -w frontend -- src/components/__tests__/GraphFlowHandle.spec.ts src/components/__tests__/GraphSidePanel.spec.ts` -> 2 files, 3 tests passed. `npm run type-check -w frontend` still fails with many pre-existing unrelated frontend/trpc typing issues.
